001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.widget.Toast;
005import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
006import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
007import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
008import androidx.navigation.NavOptions;
009import androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment;
010import androidx.preference.EditTextPreference;
011import androidx.preference.Preference;
012import androidx.preference.PreferenceFragmentCompat;
013import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.SignInViewModel;
016
017/**
018 * Preference screen for application settings and account actions.
019 *
020 * <p>This fragment manages default incubator settings, CSV export access,
021 * and sign-out behavior.
022 */
023@AndroidEntryPoint
024public class SettingsFragment extends PreferenceFragmentCompat {
025
026  private static final String KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_TEMP = "pref_default_target_temp";
027  private static final String KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_HUMIDITY = "pref_default_target_humidity";
028  private static final String KEY_EXPORT_BATCH_CSV = "pref_export_batch_csv";
029  private static final String KEY_SIGN_OUT = "pref_sign_out";
030
031  private SignInViewModel signInViewModel;
032
033  /**
034   * Loads the preference hierarchy and configures preference listeners.
035   *
036   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
037   * @param rootKey root preference key, if a subset of preferences is shown.
038   */
039  @Override
040  public void onCreatePreferences(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState, @Nullable String rootKey) {
041    setPreferencesFromResource(R.xml.root_preferences, rootKey);
042
043    EditTextPreference defaultTempPreference = findPreference(KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_TEMP);
044    EditTextPreference defaultHumidityPreference = findPreference(KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_HUMIDITY);
045    Preference exportPreference = findPreference(KEY_EXPORT_BATCH_CSV);
046    Preference signOutPreference = findPreference(KEY_SIGN_OUT);
047
048    if (defaultTempPreference != null) {
049      defaultTempPreference.setOnPreferenceChangeListener((preference, newValue) ->
050          isValidTemperature(newValue)
051      );
052    }
053
054    if (defaultHumidityPreference != null) {
055      defaultHumidityPreference.setOnPreferenceChangeListener((preference, newValue) ->
056          isValidHumidity(newValue)
057      );
058    }
059
060    if (exportPreference != null) {
061      exportPreference.setOnPreferenceClickListener((preference) -> {
062        Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.message_export_csv_placeholder, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
063            .show();
064        return true;
065      });
066    }
067
068    if (signOutPreference != null) {
069      signOutPreference.setOnPreferenceClickListener((preference) -> {
070        if (signInViewModel != null) {
071          signInViewModel.signOut();
072        }
073        return true;
074      });
075    }
076  }
077
078  /**
079   * Completes setup after the preference view has been created.
080   *
081   * <p>This method connects the fragment to the sign-in state so the user can
082   * be redirected to the sign-in screen after signing out or after an auth error.
083   *
084   * @param view fragment root view.
085   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
086   */
087  @Override
088  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull android.view.View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
089    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
090
091    signInViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(SignInViewModel.class);
092
093    signInViewModel
094        .getCredential()
095        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (credential) -> {
096          if (credential == null) {
097            NavOptions options = new NavOptions.Builder()
098                .setPopUpTo(R.id.sign_in_fragment, true)
099                .build();
100            NavHostFragment.findNavController(this)
101                .navigate(R.id.sign_in_fragment, null, options);
102          }
103        });
104
105    signInViewModel
106        .getThrowable()
107        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (throwable) -> {
108          if (throwable != null) {
109            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), throwable.getLocalizedMessage(), Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
110                .show();
111          }
112        });
113  }
114
115  private boolean isValidTemperature(Object newValue) {
116    String value = (newValue != null) ? newValue.toString().trim() : "";
117    if (value.isEmpty()) {
118      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_temperature, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
119          .show();
120      return false;
121    }
122    try {
123      Double.parseDouble(value);
124      return true;
125    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
126      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_temperature, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
127          .show();
128      return false;
129    }
130  }
131
132  private boolean isValidHumidity(Object newValue) {
133    String value = (newValue != null) ? newValue.toString().trim() : "";
134    if (value.isEmpty()) {
135      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_humidity, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
136          .show();
137      return false;
138    }
139    try {
140      double humidity = Double.parseDouble(value);
141      if (humidity < 0 || humidity > 100) {
142        Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_humidity, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
143            .show();
144        return false;
145      }
146      return true;
147    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
148      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_humidity, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
149          .show();
150      return false;
151    }
152  }
153
154}
